_description: Hand-curated deprecated -> successor codelist mapping. Covers cases where the name-prefix heuristic in fetch-ct.R cannot detect the rename automatically. Values here override (not replace) the heuristic-derived superseded_by field. Leave the value as null if the old codelist was retired without a direct successor.
_update_policy: Add a new entry only after verifying against the latest CDISC Library CT package. Prefer null over guessing. When a deprecated codelist has no direct successor, include it here with value=null so reviewers know the deprecation was explicitly reviewed (vs the heuristic simply not finding a match).
